body_transformation: Voltrb's rounded head now features smooth gunmetal plating with subtle engraved geometric patterns along its edges, while its stubby legs are replaced with reinforced steel joints and angular armor plates at the knees. The curled tail tip transforms into a rigid, segmented steel coil with polished chrome accents, and its compact body gains a seamless metallic sheen with deep indigo energy lines tracing its contours. Pointed ears become sharp, angular metal flaps with internal mechanical pistons visible through thin gaps. All organic curves are replaced with precise steel angles, maintaining the original low stance and quadruped structure.
signature_feature: Tail coil: segmented steel with polished chrome accents and internal piston mechanisms.
